nodes.label: Margo Road Map (compositor)
nodes.rationale: Source-of-truth ledger: 1.0 shipped (v1.0.0 2026-06-09), Phase 3 active. Wayland protocol parity 15/17 Tier + 5 bonus; remaining P11 drm-lease (architecture-blocked) + P13 tearing (upstream-blocked).

nodes.label: Rhai scripting engine + plugins
nodes.rationale: Rhai chosen over Lua: pure Rust (no C build), type-safe register_fn, sandbox tight by default. Mid-event-loop hooks (on_focus_change/tag_switch/window_open/close) with an Option-take recursion guard for free.

nodes.label: dwl-ipc-v2 wire protocol (superseded)
nodes.rationale: Removed 2026-06-01 along with state.json in favour of the single MARGO_SOCKET Unix control socket; kept as archaeology in the doc.

nodes.label: HDR & color management (wp_color_management_v1)
nodes.rationale: 4 phases: Phase 1 global shipped; Phases 2 (fp16 linear composite), 3 (KMS HDR metadata), 4 (per-output ICC LUT) fully scaffolded + unit-tested but runtime activation upstream-blocked on smithay DrmCompositor API surface (~30-80 LOC each once the API lands).

nodes.label: Built-in screencast portal (Mutter D-Bus shims)
nodes.rationale: Exists because Chromium-family browsers only enable Window/Entire-Screen share tabs when xdg-desktop-portal-gnome is the backend, and xdp-gnome talks to gnome-shell over 5 Mutter D-Bus interfaces. Port of niri's pattern: implement those interfaces inside the compositor. Stable Window IDs via addr_of!(*MargoClient) as u64.

nodes.label: Spring physics animation primitive
nodes.rationale: Niri-style analytical critically/under-damped solution replaced an earlier numerical integrator that drifted; per-channel velocity preserved across mid-flight retargets. Unit tests (overshoot, critical damping, 60/144Hz invariance) are the regression boundary.

nodes.label: AccessKit screen-reader bridge (a11y feature)
nodes.rationale: AccessKit Adapter runs on its own thread because zbus contention on the compositor mainloop deadlocks; off by default (--features a11y).
